meta.title: MoRoute - Travel Safer
meta.description: Travel with real-time route intelligence, incident awareness, and proactive safety guidance.

hero.description: MoRoute monitors threats, incidents, and road conditions along your route so you always know what is ahead before it is too late.

stats.label: Of travelers report fear of travel insecurity

features.sectionTitle: Every tool you need to travel with confidence

items.name: SOS Emergency
items.description: One-tap distress alert instantly sends your live location to emergency contacts and nearby first responders.

items.name: Live Safety Map
items.description: A continuously updated heat map of incidents, road hazards, danger zones, and community reports.

items.name: Route Planning
items.description: Get the safest path to your destination, automatically rerouting around high-risk areas in real time.

items.name: Report Incident
items.description: Crowdsourced reporting keeps the entire community instantly informed of threats, blockades, and hazards.

items.name: Checkpoint Verification
items.description: Verified checkpoint data flags legitimate versus suspicious roadblocks along your planned route.

items.name: Trip Analytics
items.description: Post-trip safety summaries with risk exposure data, route performance insights, and safety snapshots.

threats.sectionTitle: We track every risk on the road

items.title: Kidnapping and Abduction
items.description: Bandit groups and militants target rural and intercity travelers with ambushes on isolated roads.

items.title: Highway Robbery and Armed Assault
items.description: Armed criminals use vehicle stop-overs, fake roadblocks, and ambushes to rob and harm travelers.

items.title: Violent Contact Crimes
items.description: Physical assaults, mugging, and harassment occur at stoplights, bus stops, and remote road stretches.

items.title: Road Traffic Crashes
items.description: 1.19M annual deaths globally. The leading cause of death for people aged 5 to 29 worldwide.

cta.title: Your safety starts before you leave.
cta.description: Download MoRoute and travel with real-time intelligence in your pocket.

footer.copyright: Copyright 2026 MoRoute. Built for safer journeys
